title: astragalus columnaris
intro: Astragalus columnaris, also known as Huang qi, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family and native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus columnaris include enhanced immune function, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved cardiovascular health. Astragalus columnaris is commonly consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in soups and other culinary preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
